wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikidata tag points to a redirect that should be followed

(._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for brand prefixed tags']


wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for operator prefixed tags
operator:wikidata and operator:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because operator:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for network prefixed tags
network:wikidata and network:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because network:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for species prefixed tags
species:wikidata and species:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because species:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q124969 vs (missing) article redirects from fr:Corylus avellana to fr:Corylus avellana (Noisetier)
an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( way(1052821649)['species:wikidata'='Q124969']['species:wikipedia'='fr:Corylus avellana']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for species prefixed tags']
